name: DRIVE SMART AUTOS BUY HERE PAY HERE
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership in Pinellas Park, FL offering in-house auto financing with low down payments ($500+) and flexible terms for buyers with poor or no credit.
description_long:
Drive Smart Autos is a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) dealership located in Pinellas Park, Florida, serving the greater Tampa Bay region including St. Petersburg, Hillsborough County, and Manatee County. The dealership has been operating for over 20 years in the automotive industry and positions itself as a financing solution for consumers unable to qualify for traditional bank auto loans.

The company specializes in in-house auto financing, meaning customers make payments directly to Drive Smart Autos rather than through a traditional lender. They offer used vehicles with down payments starting at $500, flexible financing terms tailored to individual financial situations, and claim to approve applicants across a wide range of credit backgrounds including those with no credit, low credit scores, bankruptcy history, identity theft, and troubled payment histories. Customers need only bring proof of residence, proof of income (recent pay stubs or bank statements), and state-issued ID or passport.

Drive Smart Autos differentiates itself through several customer-focused features: acceptance of trade-ins to reduce upfront costs, a referral program offering $150 payment credits, willingness to work with individuals receiving SSI or disability income (not requiring current employment), and emphasis on quality-inspected vehicles selected for reliability and long-term value. Their marketing emphasizes accessibility and a "second chance" philosophy for consumers with damaged credit histories.

While BHPH financing addresses a genuine market need for credit-challenged consumers, this model typically involves significantly higher effective interest rates and payment structures than traditional auto loans. The website lacks transparency on APR, total cost of financing, payment frequency requirements, and vehicle conditions/warranties. As an alternative auto financing option rather than a small emergency loan provider, this company is miscategorized and better fits the personal-loans category for longer-term vehicle financing.
pros: Very low down payments starting at $500 make vehicle ownership accessible upfront
In-house financing eliminates traditional credit gatekeeping for borrowers with poor/no credit history
Accepts applicants receiving SSI or disability income without requiring current employment
Quality-inspected vehicles with emphasis on reliability and safety rather than high-volume sales
Accepts trade-ins to reduce upfront customer costs
Referral program provides $150 credit toward future payments for customer referrals
Over 20 years of automotive industry experience and established local operation
cons: Website provides no transparency on APR, total cost of financing, or payment schedules—critical information for borrowers
Buy Here Pay Here model typically involves substantially higher effective interest rates than traditional auto loans
No information on vehicle warranty, inspection details, or post-sale support/service
Payment frequency and default consequences not disclosed on website
Limited geographic service area (Pinellas County region only) despite marketing to wider Tampa Bay area
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional auto loans
First-time car buyers seeking affordable vehicle ownership with flexible payment terms
Individuals with bankruptcy or identity theft history on their credit report seeking transportation
diagnosis: Drive Smart Autos is best for credit-challenged consumers needing affordable vehicle transportation and willing to accept higher financing costs in exchange for approval accessibility. The critical caveat is complete lack of APR/cost transparency on their website—prospective buyers must contact them directly to understand total loan costs before committing, as Buy Here Pay Here financing typically costs significantly more than traditional auto loans.
services: In-house auto financing for used vehicles
Low down payment options starting at $500
Flexible payment plans tailored to customer financial situations
Trade-in acceptance to reduce upfront costs
Customer referral program with $150 payment credits
Wide selection of reliable pre-owned vehicles
